summary: Feature 1: Enhanced context window progress bar in StatusBar (status-bar.tsx). Bar is now wider (w-16 instead of w-10, h-1.5 instead of h-1) and uses a proper green/yellow/red color scheme: green below 70%, warning/amber 70-90%, error/red 90%+. Percentage text also color-shifts to match. Both the bar and percentage have a title tooltip showing the full breakdown, e.g. 'Context: 15.2K / 200K tokens (8% used)'. The contextTooltip() memo reads from sessionTokenStats().total and contextUsage(). Feature 2: Added ToolResponseStyle type ('concise' | 'detailed') to UISettings and toolResponseStyle field to DEFAULT_UI (default: 'concise'). Exported ToolResponseStyle from settings index. Added a 'Tool Results' settings card in BehaviorTab with a segmented Concise/Detailed toggle that calls updateUI(). Both features persist across sessions via the existing settings persistence layer. No pre-existing errors introduced — only pre-existing MessageBubble.tsx errors remain.
